mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party_member (party_id, member_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{partyId}, #{memberId}, #{role}, #{joinedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id AS memberId, m.email AS email, m.nickname AS nickname, pm.role AS role, pm.joined_at AS joinedAt FROM party_member pm JOIN member m ON m.member_id = pm.member_id WHERE pm.party_id = #{partyId} AND m.status != 'SOFT_DELETE' ORDER BY CASE pm.role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, pm.joined_at ASC
